title: Orrery
frame: +X east, +Z south, +Y up. Wide tall six-sided chamber; the disk faces ±X so the main (east) camera sees its face and the two alcove cameras (N/S) glimpse the SAME machine three-quarter through their archways.

parts.name: ceiling
parts.detail: high roof; vault above the machine is lost in shadow

parts.name: orrery disk
parts.detail: vast stately brass disk standing upright (vertical), pushed toward the far (west) wall, its face toward the entry (east); revolves around the central globe

parts.name: blue-glass globe (centre/hub)
parts.detail: fixed blue-glass globe at the disk's centre/hub; the disk revolves around it

parts.name: glass globe wheel 1
parts.detail: wheel bearing a glass globe, pirouetting ACROSS the disk's front (east) face — not through it

parts.name: south alcove floor
parts.detail: small curved alcove off the south side

parts.name: south alcove ladder rail W
parts.detail: iron ladder up a shaft (→ Starry Dome North)

parts.name: north alcove floor
parts.detail: small curved alcove off the north side

parts.name: north alcove stairs
parts.detail: archway onto a flight of ascending stairs (→ Curving Hall West End)

notes.orrery: anchor. camera pressed back against the east entry wall; the vast tilted brass disk nearly fills the frame, blue-glass globe at centre, small glass globes pirouetting on its face; vault above lost in shadow.
notes.south-alcove: stand in the small alcove looking through the archway at the SAME machine spinning in the chamber; iron ladder up a shaft beside you.
notes.north-alcove: stand in the alcove; archway onto ascending stairs; the same machine glimpsed turning through the opening.
